By comparison to numerically exact, fully quantum hierarchical equations of motion simulations, we verify that these non-Markovian effects have a significant impact on the nonequilibrium dynamics and even on the stability of the resulting Langevin equation.

AI.tldr: 负电子摩擦与非马尔可夫效应在非平衡条件下分子与金属表面相互作用中的关联研究
AI.motivation: 探究非平衡条件下分子与金属表面相互作用中负电子摩擦与非马尔可夫效应之间的内在联系，理解这些效应对非绝热振动动力学的影响
AI.method: 研究非平衡电荷传输通过包含振动耦合供体-受体模型的分子纳米结，使用数值精确的全量子分层运动方程模拟进行验证
AI.result: 发现导致负马尔可夫电子摩擦的通用非平衡机制也会引入显著的非马尔可夫贡献，这些效应对非平衡动力学和朗之万方程的稳定性有重要影响
AI.conclusion: 负电子摩擦与非马尔可夫效应在非平衡分子振动动力学中密切相关，非马尔可夫效应对系统动力学和稳定性具有关键影响

title: Emergence of Non-Hermitian Magic Angles and Topological Phase Transitions in Twisted Bilayer $α$-$T_3$ Lattices
summary: We investigate the flat-band properties and topological phase transitions in a non-Hermitian twisted bilayer $α-T_3$ lattice. Here, non-Hermiticity is introduced via Hatano-Nelson-type asymmetric hopping, while an aligned hexagonal boron nitride substrate provides a staggered sublattice mass to the system. We find that the introduction of non-reciprocal hopping splits the conventional single magic angle into three distinct non-Hermitian magic angles (NHMAs). Unlike the exceptional magic angles driven by spectral singularities, these NHMAs host perfectly isolated flat bands where the real and imaginary parts of the bandwidth simultaneously vanish. By mapping the complex eigenspectrum across the moiré Brillouin zone, we show that the scattered energy eigenvalues coalesce into well-defined, closed loop-like structures as the non-Hermitian parameter strength increases, indicating emergence of a nontrivial point-gap topology and hence the non-Hermitian skin effect. Furthermore, we characterize the topological phases by computing the direct band gap and the biorthogonal Chern number. While the system exhibits a transition to a higher topological phase at weak non-Hermiticity, we demonstrate that stronger non-Hermiticity drives the gap-closing boundaries to merge and their topological charges to mutually annihilate. This convergence results in a trivial gap closing and a complete suppression of the intermediate topological phase, confirming that non-Hermiticity fundamentally plays a crucial role with regard to destabilizing the robust topological features of this moiré system.

AI.tldr: 非厄米扭曲双层α-T₃晶格中，Hatano-Nelson型非互易跳跃导致单魔角分裂为三个非厄米魔角，产生完美孤立平带，并诱导非厄米趋肤效应和拓扑相变。
AI.motivation: 研究非厄米性对扭曲双层α-T₃晶格平带性质和拓扑相变的影响，探索非互易跳跃如何改变传统魔角物理并诱导新的拓扑现象。
AI.method: 引入Hatano-Nelson型非对称跳跃作为非厄米性来源，同时使用六方氮化硼衬底提供交错子晶格质量。通过映射复能谱、计算直接带隙和双正交陈数来表征拓扑相。
AI.result: 发现非互易跳跃将单魔角分裂为三个非厄米魔角，产生完美孤立平带（实部和虚部带宽同时为零）。强非厄米性导致能谱聚集成闭合环状结构，表明点隙拓扑和非厄米趋肤效应。弱非厄米性时系统向更高拓扑相转变，但强非厄米性导致拓扑电荷相互湮灭，中间拓扑相被完全抑制。
AI.conclusion: 非厄米性在破坏该莫尔系统的鲁棒拓扑特征方面起关键作用，能够诱导新的魔角分裂、平带形成和非厄米趋肤效应，同时也能通过拓扑电荷湮灭机制抑制拓扑相。

title: Singing Materials: Initial experiments in applying sonification to phonon spectra
summary:
Solid materials may appear static, but at the atomic scale they are in constant vibrational motion. These vibrations, described by phonons, govern many key material properties, including structural stability, mechanical strength, optical behaviour, and thermal transport. Understanding phonon physics is therefore central to the rational design of materials with targeted functionalities.
  Singing Materials is a research project that explores how sonification can be applied to this domain. In this work, we introduce \texttt{SingingMaterials}, a modular Python package for sonifying materials simulation data. The software interfaces with the Materials Project database and is designed to be extensible, enabling the incorporation of additional sonification strategies and data sources. Built using the Sonification Toolkit \texttt{Strauss}, the current implementation supports three core approaches: spectral, synthesised, and sample-based.
  We demonstrate these approaches using phonon density-of-states data and evaluate their effectiveness through a user study, investigating whether listeners can distinguish differences in material properties from their auditory representations. The results show that sonification can provide an interpretable and complementary approach for exploring vibrational materials data.

AI.tldr: SingingMaterials是一个用于材料模拟数据声化的Python包，通过声化技术将材料的声子振动数据转换为可听声音，帮助研究人员通过听觉探索材料特性。
AI.motivation: 材料在原子尺度上存在持续的振动运动（声子），这些振动决定了材料的结构稳定性、机械强度、光学行为和热传输等关键特性。理解声子物理对于材料理性设计至关重要。声化技术可以为材料研究提供一种可解释的补充方法。
AI.method: 开发了SingingMaterials模块化Python包，与Materials Project数据库接口，使用Sonification Toolkit Strauss构建。支持三种核心声化方法：光谱法、合成法和基于样本的方法。使用声子态密度数据进行演示，并通过用户研究评估有效性。
AI.result: 用户研究表明，听众能够从听觉表示中区分材料特性的差异。声化技术为探索振动材料数据提供了一种可解释且互补的方法。
AI.conclusion: 声化技术可以有效地应用于材料科学领域，通过将声子振动数据转换为声音，为材料特性分析提供新的感知维度，有助于材料设计和探索。

title: Quantum transport reveals spin glass correlations in a 2D network of TbPc$_{2}$ single-molecule magnets grafted on graphene
summary: The low temperature magnetoresistance of graphene functionalized by an array of magnetic Terbium Phthalocyanines molecules is found to exhibit a magnetic field-dependent 1/f noise, along with universal conductance fluctuations (UCFs) typical of a mesoscopic phase-coherent sample. A thorough analysis of the magnetic field, temperature and chemical potential dependence of this 1/f noise and UCFs reveals that long range, 2D Ising spin-glass like, magnetic correlations are induced in graphene through exchange interactions between the magnetic molecules and charge carriers in graphene. These experiments show that graphene functionalized with organic molecules constitutes a versatile platform for the investigation of magnetic phase transitions in two dimensions.

AI.tldr: 石墨烯功能化后出现磁场依赖的1/f噪声和通用电导涨落，揭示了二维伊辛自旋玻璃样磁关联
AI.motivation: 研究石墨烯功能化后磁分子与电荷载流子之间的交换相互作用如何影响其磁性和输运性质
AI.method: 通过测量功能化石墨烯在低温下的磁阻、磁场依赖的1/f噪声和通用电导涨落，分析磁场、温度和化学势的依赖性
AI.result: 发现长程二维伊辛自旋玻璃样磁关联通过磁分子与石墨烯电荷载流子的交换相互作用被诱导产生
AI.conclusion: 功能化石墨烯为研究二维磁相变提供了一个多功能平台

title: Unquenched orbital angular momentum as the origin of spin inertia
summary: The recent proposal and observation of spin inertia, and the consequent high-frequency spin nutation mode, have raised key questions for our understanding of magnetization dynamics, especially considering its high relevance for magnetic memories and ultrafast switching. Notwithstanding recent progress, a clear identification of spin inertia's physical origin thereby offering predictive power remains to be accomplished. Here, discussing general principles for identifying this physical origin, we examine unquenched orbital angular momentum (OAM) finding it to be a key candidate, despite its typically small value. Treating OAM and spin within a two-sublattice model, we derive the equivalent single-sublattice framework for magnetization dynamics making appropriate approximations. The latter naturally manifests the spin inertia term and parameter, which are otherwise introduced phenomenologically. The inertia parameter evaluated within our model is found to be in good agreement with its experimentally observed value in cobalt. We further delineate key experimental signatures that could verify or rule out the unquenched OAM as the origin of the observed high-frequency mode, and avoid a spurious optical mode in a two-sublattice ferromagnet from being identified as nutation. Our analysis offers a potential link between the recently emerged fields of orbitronics and spin inertia, thereby motivating investigations at their intersection.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出未淬灭的轨道角动量是自旋惯性的物理起源，建立了理论模型解释高频自旋章动模式，并与钴的实验数据吻合。
AI.motivation: 自旋惯性和高频自旋章动模式的发现对磁化动力学理解提出了关键问题，但对其物理起源缺乏清晰识别和预测能力。研究旨在探索未淬灭轨道角动量作为自旋惯性起源的可能性。
AI.method: 采用双亚晶格模型处理轨道角动量和自旋，通过适当近似推导出等效的单亚晶格磁化动力学框架，该框架自然显现出自旋惯性项和参数。
AI.result: 模型计算的自旋惯性参数与钴中实验观测值吻合良好。研究进一步提出了验证未淬灭轨道角动量作为高频模式起源的关键实验特征，并区分了双亚晶格铁磁体中的虚假光学模式。
AI.conclusion: 未淬灭轨道角动量可能是自旋惯性的物理起源，这为轨道电子学和自旋惯性两个新兴领域的交叉研究提供了潜在联系。

title: Longest weakly increasing subsequences of discrete random walks on the integers with heavy tailed distribution of increments
comment: elsarticle style, 21 pages, 13 figures and a few tables
summary:
We investigate the behavior of the length of the longest weakly increasing subsequences (weak LIS) of $n$-step random walks with nonzero integer increments $k = \pm 1, \pm 2, \dots$ given by a zero-mean, symmetric heavy tailed mass distribution proportional to $|k|^{-1-α}$ for several values of the real parameter $α> 0$ together with that of the simple random walk ($k=\pm 1$), to which the $n$-step heavy tailed random walks tends when $α> (1+o(1))\log_{2}{n}$.
  By means of exploratory fits, weighted nonlinear least squares, and ANOVA model comparison, we found that the sample average length $\langle{L_{n}}\rangle$ scales like $\langle{L_{n}}\rangle \sim \sqrt{n}\log{n}$ when the distribution of increments has finite variance ($α> 2$) and $\langle{L_{n}}\rangle \sim n^θ$ with a varying exponent $θ> 0.5$ when the variance is infinite ($α\leq 2$). Distributional diagnostics indicate that the bulk of the $L_{n}$ distribution is very well-approximated by a lognormal model, though systematic deviations are observed in the tails.
  Our results corroborate and expand upon previous results for the LIS of other types of heavy-tailed random walks and raise a conjecture as to whether the distribution of $L_{n}$ is given, or can be effectively described, by a lognormal distribution.

AI.tldr: 研究重尾随机游走中弱递增子序列长度的渐近行为，发现当增量方差有限时平均长度按√n log n增长，方差无限时按n^θ增长，且分布近似对数正态分布。
AI.motivation: 研究具有重尾增量的随机游走中弱递增子序列长度的渐近行为，特别是当增量分布具有无限方差时，与简单随机游走（增量方差有限）的行为进行对比。
AI.method: 使用探索性拟合、加权非线性最小二乘法和ANOVA模型比较，分析不同α值下重尾随机游走的弱递增子序列长度，并与简单随机游走对比。
AI.result: 当增量方差有限（α>2）时，平均长度⟨L_n⟩∼√n log n；当方差无限（α≤2）时，⟨L_n⟩∼n^θ（θ>0.5）。L_n分布的主体部分很好地近似于对数正态分布，但尾部存在系统性偏差。
AI.conclusion: 结果证实并扩展了先前关于重尾随机游走LIS的研究，提出了L_n分布是否由对数正态分布给出或有效描述的问题，为进一步研究提供了方向。

title: Gate-Tunable Mid-Infrared Electroluminescence from Te/MoS2 p-n Heterojunctions
summary: Mid-infrared (MIR) emitters are critical components in advanced photonic systems, driving progress in fields such as chemical sensing, environmental monitoring, medical diagnostics, thermal imaging and free-space communications. Conventional MIR emitters based on III-V heterostructures rely on complex epitaxial growth on rigid lattice-matched substrates and suffer from limited integration compatibility with CMOS or flexible platforms. The recent development of novel MIR emitters based on two-dimensional (2D) materials such as black phosphorus (BP) is more suitable for on-chip applications but faces challenges related to stability and emission efficiency. Based on the recently discovered highly efficient photoluminescence of Te, we demonstrate a gate-tunable midinfrared light-emitting diode based on a van der Waals heterojunction formed by multilayer transition metal dichalcogenide (TMD) MoS2 and tellurium (Te). The device emits polarized electroluminescence (EL) centered at 3.5 $μ$m under forward bias at 25 K, and the EL persists up to 80 K with reduced intensity. Gate control of the MoS2 Fermi level modulates the band alignment and injection efficiency, enabling dynamic tuning of the EL intensity. The emission remains spectrally stable under varying bias and gating, indicating robust band-edge recombination. These results establish the Te/TMD heterostructure as a promising platform for integrated polarized mid-infrared optoelectronics.

AI.tldr: 基于MoS2-Te范德华异质结的门控可调谐中红外发光二极管，在3.5μm波长处实现偏振电致发光，工作温度可达80K
AI.motivation: 传统III-V族中红外发光器件需要复杂的外延生长，与CMOS或柔性平台集成困难；基于二维材料（如黑磷）的新型器件则面临稳定性和发光效率挑战。利用Te的高效光致发光特性，开发可集成、可调谐的中红外发光器件
AI.method: 采用多层MoS2和Te形成范德华异质结，通过门电压调控MoS2的费米能级来调节能带对齐和注入效率，实现电致发光强度的动态调控
AI.result: 在25K温度下，器件在3.5μm波长处产生偏振电致发光，发光可持续到80K（强度减弱）；门控可动态调节发光强度，且发射光谱在不同偏压和门压下保持稳定
AI.conclusion: Te/TMD异质结为集成化偏振中红外光电子器件提供了有前景的平台，具有可调谐、稳定和可集成的优势

title: Continuous three-dimensional imaging of nanoscale dynamics by in situ electron tomography
summary: Direct observation of nanoscale transformations in three dimensions (3D) is essential for understanding materials evolution under operating conditions, yet dynamic electron tomography remains limited by slow tilt series acquisition and by reconstruction methods that assume static specimens. These constraints prevent continuous 3D imaging of evolving structures and require electron doses that can alter the specimens and their dynamics. Here, we introduce a framework for dynamic electron tomography that combines continuous tilting with a self-supervised deep-learning reconstruction strategy. Our approach incorporates the temporal aspect into the electron tomography reconstruction process to recover 3D volumes at arbitrary time points from a single tilt series. We validate the method using simulations and demonstrate its merit in experimental studies of heat-induced transformations, including morphological evolution of Au nanostars and alloying in Au@Ag nanocubes. Our results establish a practical framework for dynamic, dose-efficient electron tomography, enabling in situ 3D investigation of nanomaterial transformations as well as the characterization of beam-sensitive structures.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合连续倾斜和自监督深度学习重建的动态电子断层扫描框架，能够从单个倾斜系列恢复任意时间点的3D体积，实现剂量高效的原位纳米材料3D观测。
AI.motivation: 传统动态电子断层扫描受限于缓慢的倾斜系列采集和假设静态样本的重建方法，无法连续3D成像演化结构，且电子剂量可能改变样本及其动力学。
AI.method: 结合连续倾斜与自监督深度学习重建策略，将时间维度纳入电子断层扫描重建过程，从单个倾斜系列恢复任意时间点的3D体积。
AI.result: 通过模拟验证了方法有效性，并在实验研究中展示了热诱导转变的应用，包括Au纳米星形态演化和Au@Ag纳米立方体合金化过程。
AI.conclusion: 建立了一个实用的动态、剂量高效电子断层扫描框架，实现了纳米材料转变的原位3D研究，以及对光束敏感结构的表征。

title: Energy level alignment of vacancy-ordered halide double perovskites
summary: Vacancy-ordered double perovskites have emerged as lead-free alternatives, offering remarkable stability and compositional tunability for optoelectronic applications. In this study, we provide first-principles insights into their electronic properties, surface stability, and energy level alignment using a non-empirical, dielectric-dependent hybrid functional. For a representative family of Cs$_2$MX$_6$ compounds, with M = Zr, Sn, Te, and X= Cl, Br, I, our calculations reveal that the predicted bulk electronic band gaps are in excellent agreement with those obtained using the state-of-the-art GW method, validating the accuracy of our approach. We investigate the stability of these materials under simulated experimental conditions, considering both the rich and poor chemical potentials of their precursor salts. Our results indicate distinct regions of surface energy stability that favor CsX terminations. In contrast, MX$_4$ terminations show in-gap surface states, which can act as trap states and reduce carrier lifetime. Finally, based solely on the intrinsic absolute energy levels, we identify promising candidates as charge transport and injection layers for typical photovoltaic and light-emitting applications. This study provides a detailed map of energy level alignment at Cs$_2$MX$_6$ surfaces, offering valuable design principles for the development of next-generation Cs$_2$MX$_6$-based optoelectronic devices.

AI.tldr: 该研究采用非经验性介电依赖杂化泛函，对Cs₂MX₆（M=Zr, Sn, Te; X=Cl, Br, I）空位有序双钙钛矿的电子性质、表面稳定性和能级排列进行了第一性原理计算，为光电器件设计提供指导。
AI.motivation: 空位有序双钙钛矿作为无铅替代材料，在光电子应用中具有优异的稳定性和可调组成性，但其电子性质、表面稳定性和能级排列的系统研究仍不充分。
AI.method: 使用非经验性介电依赖杂化泛函进行第一性原理计算，研究Cs₂MX₆化合物的体相电子带隙、表面稳定性（考虑前驱体盐的富/贫化学势），以及能级排列。
AI.result: 计算得到的体相电子带隙与最先进的GW方法结果高度一致；表面稳定性分析显示CsX终止表面更稳定，而MX₄终止表面存在带隙内表面态（陷阱态）；基于本征绝对能级识别出适合光伏和发光应用的电荷传输/注入层候选材料。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提供了Cs₂MX₆表面能级排列的详细图谱，为空位有序双钙钛矿基下一代光电器件的开发提供了有价值的设计原则。

title: Intrinsic Temporal Coherence Governs Heat Transport of Zone-Folded Phonons
summary: While spatial phonon coherence manifested through band folding is believed to be a key factor governing the anomalous thermal conductivity of periodic structures, we investigate phonon transport from the perspective of temporal coherence. Using mode-resolved analyses, we quantify temporal coherent contributions and elucidate the interplay between phonon coherence time and lifetime in heat conduction of graphene/hexagonal boron nitride superlattices. We find that intrinsic coherence of folded phonon modes dominates the enhancement in ultrashort-period superlattices. In contrast, Wigner transport equation yields only a minor effect of band folding on thermal conductivity. The predictions in temperature dependence of models with and without temporal coherence provide a falsifiable experimental signature of this effect. Temporal coherence therefore constitutes a previously overlooked but fundamental channel for heat conduction, extending the conventional picture of spatially coherent transport and deepening the understanding of phonon dynamics in superlattices.

AI.tldr: 该研究从时间相干性角度探究了石墨烯/六方氮化硼超晶格中的声子输运，发现折叠声子模式的本征相干性主导了超短周期超晶格中的热导率增强，而Wigner输运方程仅显示带折叠的次要影响。
AI.motivation: 传统上认为空间声子相干性（通过能带折叠体现）是周期性结构中异常热导率的关键因素，但本研究从时间相干性角度出发，探究声子输运中时间相干性的作用。
AI.method: 采用模式分辨分析方法，量化时间相干贡献，阐明声子相干时间与寿命在石墨烯/六方氮化硼超晶格热传导中的相互作用。
AI.result: 发现折叠声子模式的本征相干性主导超短周期超晶格中的热导率增强；Wigner输运方程仅显示带折叠的次要影响；含与不含时间相干性的模型在温度依赖性上的预测差异提供了可验证的实验特征。
AI.conclusion: 时间相干性是热传导中先前被忽视但基本的通道，扩展了传统空间相干输运的图像，深化了对超晶格中声子动力学的理解。

title: Fe-site-resolved anisotropy energies in Nd$_2$Fe$_{14}$B for atomistic spin dynamics
summary: Nd-Fe-B magnets are the most widely used high performance magnets in the world today, and remain the subject of both experimental and computational research aimed at understanding and optimizing them. Atomistic spin dynamics (ASD) is one technique which has been used in recent years to provide insight into magnetic properties relevant to coercivity, such as domain wall width. Although it is relatively clear how to model magnetocrystalline anisotropy arising from rare-earth atoms in these simulations, the contribution from the transition metal Fe is less obvious, due to the itinerant nature of the magnetism. Here, we examine previous treatments of Fe anisotropy in ASD simulations and identify a discrepancy with previously-published first-principles studies. We derive two models which correct this discrepancy, one based on single-ion theory and the other on anisotropic exchange, and test their performance by comparing to first-principles torque calculations on Y$_2$Fe$_{14}$B. The torque calculations show a contribution which cannot be explained by the single-ion model but arises naturally from (antisymmetric) anisotropic exchange. We propose practical strategies to model Fe anisotropy in future ASD simulations, including a simplified (mean-field) description of anisotropic exchange, which may have applications beyond R$_2$Fe$_{14}$B to the wider class of itinerant magnetic materials.

AI.tldr: 本文针对Nd-Fe-B磁体中Fe各向异性的原子自旋动力学模拟问题，发现现有模型与第一性原理计算存在差异，提出了两种修正模型，并通过Y₂Fe₁₄B的扭矩计算验证了各向异性交换模型的有效性。
AI.motivation: Nd-Fe-B磁体是当今应用最广泛的高性能磁体，但其原子自旋动力学模拟中Fe的各向异性贡献存在建模困难，因为Fe的磁性具有巡游特性。现有模拟方法与第一性原理研究存在不一致，需要更准确的模型来描述Fe的各向异性。
AI.method: 研究分析了先前ASD模拟中Fe各向异性的处理方法，发现了与第一性原理研究的差异。提出了两种修正模型：基于单离子理论的模型和基于各向异性交换的模型。通过Y₂Fe₁₄B的扭矩计算来测试这些模型的性能，并与第一性原理计算结果进行比较。
AI.result: 扭矩计算结果显示，存在无法用单离子模型解释的贡献，但这一贡献自然地来自于（反对称）各向异性交换。各向异性交换模型能够更好地解释第一性原理计算结果。
AI.conclusion: 提出了未来ASD模拟中建模Fe各向异性的实用策略，包括简化的（平均场）各向异性交换描述方法。这种方法不仅适用于R₂Fe₁₄B材料，还可能推广到更广泛的巡游磁性材料类别。

title: Nonlinear response theory for orbital photocurrent in semiconductors
summary: Recent theoretical studies on the nonlinear response of spin and orbital degrees of freedom have discovered spin and orbital analogs of the photocurrent, with potential for characterizing topological materials and for applications. In this paper, we develop a general theory for calculating spin and orbital currents in semiconductors and study the properties of optical responses in the Bernevig-Hughes-Zhang and Luttinger models, where nonlinear orbital responses and a topological phase transition occur. We study the evolution of optical responses at the topological phase transition and how they manifest. In addition, we find that the relaxation time dependence of the orbital conductivity is somewhat distinct from that of the photocurrent. The theory is straightforwardly applicable to complex models of real materials, allowing quantitative predictions of the nonlinear responses of orbital and spin.

AI.tldr: 该论文建立了计算半导体中自旋和轨道电流的一般理论，研究了BHZ和Luttinger模型中的非线性光学响应，包括拓扑相变处的响应演化及其表现。
AI.motivation: 非线性自旋和轨道响应（类似光电流）在表征拓扑材料和实际应用中具有潜力，需要发展一般理论来定量预测这些响应。
AI.method: 发展了计算半导体中自旋和轨道电流的一般理论框架，并将其应用于Bernevig-Hughes-Zhang (BHZ) 模型和Luttinger模型，研究非线性轨道响应和拓扑相变。
AI.result: 研究了拓扑相变处光学响应的演化及其表现方式，发现轨道电导率的弛豫时间依赖性与光电流有所不同。
AI.conclusion: 该理论可直接应用于真实材料的复杂模型，能够定量预测轨道和自旋的非线性响应，为拓扑材料表征和应用提供了理论工具。

title: Thermal Conductivity and Temperature-Induced Band Gap Renormalization in Crystalline and Amorphous Ga$_2$O$_3$
summary: In the present work, we performed calculations of the lattice thermal conductivity (LTC) and electron-phonon interactions in crystalline and amorphous gallium oxide. The calculations were performed by coupling a machine-learned interatomic potential - the moment tensor potential (MTP) model - to first-principles calculations. Crystalline $β$-Ga$_2$O$_3$ exhibits a pronounced zero-point band gap renormalization (BGR) of $\sim 0.2\,\text{eV}$ and a BGR of $\sim 0.45\,\text{eV}$ at $700\,\text{K}$. The computed temperature dependence of BGR induced by classical nuclear motion in $β$-Ga$_2$O$_3$ is stronger than that in amorphous Ga$_2$O$_3$. Thermal transport calculations reveal that the LTC of amorphous Ga$_2$O$_3$ remains near $0.9\,\text{W}\cdot\text{m}^{-1}\cdot\text{K}^{-1}$ for temperatures between $300\,\text{K}$ and $700\,\text{K}$, which is approximately an order of magnitude lower than that of $β$-Ga$_2$O$_3$. Overall, the presented MTP-based framework provides a computationally tractable and reliable route for predicting properties of semiconductors (both crystalline and amorphous) under operating conditions relevant to microelectronics and optoelectronics.

AI.tldr: 结合机器学习势函数与第一性原理计算，研究了晶体和非晶氧化镓的热导率与电子-声子相互作用，发现非晶氧化镓热导率比晶体低约一个数量级。
AI.motivation: 开发一种计算上可行且可靠的方法来预测半导体（包括晶体和非晶态）在微电子和光电子应用相关条件下的性质，特别是热导率和电子-声子相互作用。
AI.method: 将机器学习原子间势函数（矩张量势MTP模型）与第一性原理计算相结合，计算晶体β-Ga₂O₃和非晶Ga₂O₃的晶格热导率和电子-声子相互作用。
AI.result: 晶体β-Ga₂O₃显示出显著的零点能带重整化（~0.2 eV）和700K时的带重整化（~0.45 eV）。非晶Ga₂O₃在300-700K温度范围内的热导率保持在约0.9 W·m⁻¹·K⁻¹，比晶体β-Ga₂O₃低约一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 基于MTP的计算框架为预测半导体（包括晶体和非晶态）在微电子和光电子应用条件下的性质提供了一条计算上可行且可靠的途径。

title: The geometric origin of criticality: a universal mechanism in mean-field rotor Hamiltonians
summary:
We introduce a universal criterion for criticality in mean-field rotor Hamiltonians based on the geometric structure of the constant-energy shell. Rather than characterizing the onset of a phase transition through the conventional thermodynamic singularities alone, we show that the relevant information is already encoded in the way the geometry of the shell reorganizes along distinguished collective directions.
  For a broad class of finite-dimensional trigonometric mean-field interactions, the trace of the Weingarten operator (representing the principal curvatures) admits a universal collective expansion in terms of the order-parameter amplitudes. This expansion defines an energy-dependent quadratic form whose eigenmodes identify the geometrically unstable channels of the system. Criticality is then associated with the vanishing of the corresponding curvature coefficients, yielding a direct geometric selection principle for the modes that become unstable at the transition.
  In this way, the phase transition in mean-field systems (usually of first- or second-order) is reformulated as a geometric instability phenomenon intrinsic to the microcanonical energy shell. The resulting framework is geometrically universal within the class considered, independent of model-specific details except for a finite set of collective couplings. Moreover, our approach recovers the known critical channels in standard mean-field rotor models while extending naturally to multimode and spectrally coupled cases. These results support a view in which critical behavior can be understood as reorganizations of energy-shell geometry triggered by a collective restructuring of the underlying energy-shell geometry.

AI.tldr: 提出基于能量壳几何结构的平均场转子哈密顿量临界性通用判据，将相变重构为能量壳的几何不稳定性现象
AI.motivation: 传统热力学奇点方法不足以完全描述相变，需要从能量壳几何结构的角度理解临界现象的本质
AI.method: 利用魏因加滕算子的迹（代表主曲率）建立关于序参量振幅的通用集体展开，通过曲率系数消失定义临界性
AI.result: 建立了几何普适的临界性框架，能够恢复标准平均场转子模型的已知临界通道，并扩展到多模和谱耦合情况
AI.conclusion: 临界行为可理解为能量壳几何结构的重组现象，为理解相变提供了新的几何视角

title: Fano Resonances in Mismatched C$_3$N Nanoribbon Junctions
summary: Mismatched junctions formed by two C$_3$N zigzag nanoribbons of different widths provide a useful setting for studying quantum interference effects involving edge state transport. A crucial ingredient for this interference to appear is, besides the presence of edge states, the formation of localized interface states at the mismatched interface of the junction. At the level of a tight-binding model it is shown that, by means of an external gate potential, one of the edge state energy bands can selectively be shifted into the energy range of the localized interface states. The resulting coupling between the edge and localized interface states gives rise to pronounced Fano resonances in both the density of states and the transmission spectrum with line shapes well described by the canonical Fano formula. Furthermore, it is found that the geometrical mismatch of the junction not only determines the number of resonances but also the energetic orientation of their asymmetric line shapes. These results identify mismatched C$_3$N nanojunctions as a tunable and robust platform for engineering interference-driven transport.

AI.tldr: C₃N纳米带错配结中的边缘态与局域界面态耦合产生可调谐的法诺共振，为量子干涉输运提供平台
AI.motivation: 研究错配C₃N纳米结中的量子干涉效应，特别是边缘态输运与局域界面态的相互作用，为设计可调控的量子干涉器件提供理论基础
AI.method: 采用紧束缚模型研究不同宽度C₃N锯齿形纳米带形成的错配结，通过外加栅极电势选择性调控边缘态能带，分析边缘态与局域界面态的耦合机制
AI.result: 栅极电势可将边缘态能带选择性移入局域界面态能量范围，两者耦合产生显著的法诺共振，共振线形符合标准法诺公式，结的几何错配决定共振数量和线形不对称性取向
AI.conclusion: 错配C₃N纳米结可作为可调谐且稳健的平台，用于设计和调控基于量子干涉的输运特性，为纳米电子器件应用提供新途径

title: Meron Spin Textures Mediated by Acoustic Phase Singularities
summary: Existing acoustic topological textures are predominantly constructed within velocity fields, where the corresponding physical observables typically exhibit harmonic temporal oscillations. In contrast, stationary topological acoustic textures are highly desirable for characterizing topological phenomena and advancing potential applications of topological quasiparticles. Here, we propose a novel framework for topological acoustic spin textures rooted in acoustic spin, and experimentally demonstrate stable acoustic spin meron lattices supported by spoof surface acoustic-wave modes. We show that phase singularities in acoustic standing waves play a pivotal role in the formation of acoustic spin. Furthermore, we demonstrate that the phase differences among distinct groups of standing waves govern the polarization of the emergent topological quasiparticles and enable precise modulation of their intensities. Moreover, the resulting topological spin textures exhibit remarkable robustness against boundary scattering and local structural defects. Our findings establish acoustic spin as a fundamental degree of freedom for engineering topological quasiparticles in acoustics and open a new avenue toward programmable stationary topological acoustic textures.

AI.tldr: 提出基于声学自旋的拓扑声学自旋纹理新框架，实验演示了稳定的声学自旋meron晶格，为可编程静态拓扑声学纹理开辟新途径。
AI.motivation: 现有声学拓扑纹理主要在速度场中构建，对应的物理可观测量通常呈现谐波时间振荡。相比之下，静态拓扑声学纹理对于表征拓扑现象和推进拓扑准粒子应用至关重要。
AI.method: 提出基于声学自旋的拓扑声学自旋纹理新框架，利用声学驻波中的相位奇点形成声学自旋，通过不同驻波群之间的相位差控制拓扑准粒子的极化和强度调制。
AI.result: 实验演示了稳定的声学自旋meron晶格，拓扑自旋纹理对边界散射和局部结构缺陷表现出显著鲁棒性，声学自旋成为工程化声学拓扑准粒子的基本自由度。
AI.conclusion: 声学自旋是工程化声学拓扑准粒子的基本自由度，为可编程静态拓扑声学纹理开辟了新途径。

title: Exploring non-trivial band structure and spin polarizations in $d$-wave altermagnets tailored by anisotropic optical fields
summary: The subject of the present paper is a detailed theoretical investigation of the energy spectrum and bandgaps, as well as collective properties and linear response, in $d$-wave altermagnets in the presence of an off-resonance optical dressing field. We consider the altermagnets with both $d_{x^2-y^2}$ and $d_{xy}$ pairing symmetries and focus on anisotropic dressing fields applied to an anisotropic and non-linear electron Hamiltonian. We have uncovered several crucial properties of the resulting electron-dressed state; specifically, we found that a finite bandgap is opened by linearly polarized irradiation, a phenomenon not observed in Dirac materials. A number of crucial properties of the electron dressed states in the presence of the linearly polarized light can be uncovered only in the second-order perturbation expansion, which is often omitted. We demonstrate that introducing an anisotropic driving field leads to several subtle yet important changes in the Edelstein susceptibilities of altermagents, enabling the fine-tuning of their spin polarizations. All these results must be in high demand due to the rapidly developing fields of spintronics and device physics.

AI.tldr: 该论文理论研究了d波交变磁体在非共振光场下的能谱、带隙、集体性质和线性响应特性，发现线偏振光可打开有限带隙，并揭示了各向异性驱动场对自旋极化的精细调控作用。
AI.motivation: 随着自旋电子学和器件物理的快速发展，需要深入理解d波交变磁体在光场调控下的电子性质，特别是各向异性驱动场对自旋极化的调控机制，这对开发新型自旋电子器件具有重要意义。
AI.method: 采用详细的理论研究方法，考虑具有d_{x^2-y^2}和d_{xy}配对对称性的交变磁体，分析各向异性非线性电子哈密顿量在各向异性光场下的响应，特别关注二阶微扰展开中揭示的关键性质。
AI.result: 发现线偏振辐照可打开有限带隙（狄拉克材料中未观察到的现象），各向异性驱动场导致Edelstein磁化率发生微妙但重要的变化，实现了自旋极化的精细调控。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了d波交变磁体在光场调控下的独特性质，特别是二阶微扰效应的重要性，为自旋电子学和器件物理领域提供了重要的理论指导，有望推动相关器件的发展。

title: Theory of quantum decoherence and its application to anomalous Hall effect
summary: Coherent quantum phenomena can only emerge when decoherence is minimized, and mastery over decoherence is technologically crucial for designing and operating functional quantum devices. However, its microscopic mechanisms in spin-orbit-coupled ferromagnets remain elusive, and quantitative treatments have long been challenging. To solve this fundamentally significant and technologically crucial problem, we develop a quantum master-equation framework with a general ansatz for the off-diagonal density matrix that simultaneously captures electric-field-driven coherence and impurity-scattering-induced decoherence. This unified approach enables quantitative analysis of how decoherence reshapes the intrinsic anomalous Hall effect, revealing a clear crossover between intrinsic and extrinsic regimes. Remarkably, we identify a previously unrecognized extrinsic contribution: a second-order scattering process tightly relative to quantum decoherence-that is fundamentally distinct from both skew scattering and side jump mechanisms, yet substantially more significant than the skew scattering mechanism. Our work establishes decoherence as a key element in quantum transport and provides a systematic extension of the Boltzmann transport equation to incorporate decoherence, with broad implications for robust spintronic functionality.

AI.tldr: 该论文开发了一个量子主方程框架来研究自旋轨道耦合铁磁体中的退相干机制，揭示了退相干如何重塑反常霍尔效应，并发现了一种新的二阶散射过程。
AI.motivation: 量子相干现象需要最小化退相干，但自旋轨道耦合铁磁体中退相干的微观机制仍然不清楚，定量处理长期具有挑战性。解决这个基础重要且技术关键的问题对于设计功能量子器件至关重要。
AI.method: 开发了一个量子主方程框架，采用非对角密度矩阵的一般拟设，同时捕捉电场驱动的相干性和杂质散射诱导的退相干。这种统一方法能够定量分析退相干如何重塑本征反常霍尔效应。
AI.result: 揭示了本征和外在机制之间的清晰交叉，并识别出一个以前未被认识的外在贡献：一个与量子退相干紧密相关的二阶散射过程。这个过程与斜散射和侧跳机制根本不同，但比斜散射机制更显著。
AI.conclusion: 该工作确立了退相干作为量子输运的关键要素，并提供了将退相干纳入玻尔兹曼输运方程的系统扩展，对稳健的自旋电子学功能具有广泛意义。

title: On the flash temperature in sliding contacts
summary: The temperature increase in the contact regions between solids in sliding contact can easily reach several hundred Kelvin and thereby dramatically affect friction and wear. The classical theories by Jaeger, Archard, and Greenwood, commonly used to estimate flash temperature, ignore the multiscale nature of real surfaces and instead approximate the frictional heat sources with circular or square shapes. Here, we present an analytical theory for the flash temperature valid for randomly rough surfaces with roughness across arbitrarily many decades in length scale. The theory extends established methods for stress correlation functions and peak stresses to temperature. Numerical results for rubber sliding on concrete, and granite on granite, are presented as illustrations. We show that classical theories for flash temperature fail severely for surfaces with multiscale roughness.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种适用于多尺度粗糙表面的闪温分析理论，解决了经典理论忽略表面多尺度特性导致严重误差的问题
AI.motivation: 经典闪温理论（Jaeger、Archard、Greenwood）假设热源为圆形或方形，忽略了真实表面的多尺度粗糙特性，导致温度估计严重不准确
AI.method: 开发了适用于任意多尺度粗糙表面的解析理论，将应力相关函数和峰值应力的方法扩展到温度分析，并通过数值模拟验证
AI.result: 经典闪温理论在多尺度粗糙表面情况下严重失效，新理论能更准确地预测橡胶-混凝土和花岗岩-花岗岩滑动接触的闪温
AI.conclusion: 必须考虑表面多尺度粗糙度才能准确预测滑动接触中的闪温，新理论为摩擦磨损分析提供了更可靠的工具

title: Magnetically Induced Switching-Current Jumps in InAs/Al Josephson Junctions
comment: Main text: 9 pages, 4 figure. Supporting Information: 10 pages, 5 figures
summary: We report Barkhausen-like switching at millitesla fields in an $n$-doped InAs/Al nanowire Josephson junction, which serves as an interferometric probe of intrinsic magnetic reconfigurations, as evidenced by discrete switching-current jumps. At $T=30$~mK the device displays a Fraunhofer-like modulation with $I_{\mathrm{sw}}(0)\approx 0.24~μ\mathrm{A}$ and an abrupt transition at $|B|\approx 3~\mathrm{mT}$ between two branches differing by $ΔI_{\mathrm{sw}}\approx 0.13~μ\mathrm{A}$. By tracking the characteristic field scales from $30$ to $900$~mK, we find that the jump field is essentially temperature-independent, whereas the superconducting critical field decreases with temperature, as expected for thin Al films. The sharp discontinuity, sweep-direction asymmetry, and reproducibility across repeated scans point to avalanche-like switching between metastable magnetic configurations of the local magnetic texture, which are directly coupled to the weak link. Within an effective-field framework, each reconfiguration modifies a local field offset, thereby reshaping the interference response and leading to an abrupt reorganization of the switching-current pattern.

AI.tldr: 在InAs/Al纳米线约瑟夫森结中观察到类似巴克豪森效应的毫特斯拉磁场切换现象，表现为离散的切换电流跳跃，揭示了局部磁结构的雪崩式重构。
AI.motivation: 研究纳米线约瑟夫森结中磁场诱导的开关行为，探索局部磁结构重构与超导干涉效应之间的耦合机制。
AI.method: 使用n掺杂InAs/Al纳米线约瑟夫森结作为干涉探针，在30-900 mK温度范围内测量切换电流随磁场的变化，追踪特征磁场尺度。
AI.result: 在|B|≈3 mT处观察到两个分支间的尖锐转变，ΔI_sw≈0.13 μA。跳跃磁场基本与温度无关，而超导临界场随温度降低。切换表现出尖锐不连续性、扫描方向不对称性和可重复性。
AI.conclusion: 观测到的现象表明局部磁结构在亚稳态构型间的雪崩式切换，每个重构改变局部磁场偏移，从而重塑干涉响应并导致切换电流模式的突然重组。

title: Superlinear Temperature-Dependent Resistivity and Structural Phase Transition in BaNi$_2$P$_4$
summary: The mechanism of anomalous superlinear temperature-dependent resistivity, $ρ(T)$, in the metallic unconventional clathrate BaNi$_2$P$_4$ was studied by examining its evolution with artificial disorder induced by low-temperature ($\sim$ 20 K) 2.5 MeV electron irradiation. We find a dominant effect of the tetragonal-orthorhombic transition at $T_s$ ($ \sim$373 to 378 K, depending on heat cycle rate and direction) on $ρ(T)$, with standard metallic $T-$linear resistivity above the transition and anomalous behavior in the orthorhombic phase below. The transition is accompanied by the formation of structural domains and a notable (about 4~K) hysteresis in the magnetization and resistivity measurements, clearly showing its first order character. Matthiessen rule is obeyed both above and below the transition, suggesting negligible changes in the electronic structure. This conclusion is supported by the smooth evolution of the Hall effect through the transition. The Hall number is in good agreement with band structure calculations both above and below the transition. The transition temperature is notably suppressed with electron irradiation. Raman scattering at temperatures above room temperature find softening of local Ba vibration mode in the orthorhombic phase on approaching the transition. $^{31}P$ NMR line splits in the orthorhombic phase, suggesting a partial shift of the Ba atom from the central position in the cage. We suggest that local Ba rattling leads to enhanced residual contribution to resistivity in the high temperature tetragonal phase, the decay of which is responsible for the anomalous temperature-dependent resistivity in the orthorhombic phase.

AI.tldr: 通过电子辐照研究BaNi₂P₄中异常超线性温度依赖电阻率的机制，发现四方-正交相变是主要影响因素，局部Ba原子振动导致高温相中残余电阻增强，其衰减是正交相中异常电阻行为的根源。
AI.motivation: 研究金属性非常规笼合物BaNi₂P₄中异常超线性温度依赖电阻率ρ(T)的物理机制，特别是四方-正交结构相变对电阻行为的影响。
AI.method: 使用低温（~20 K）2.5 MeV电子辐照引入人工无序，结合电阻率、磁化强度、霍尔效应、拉曼散射和³¹P核磁共振等多种测量技术，系统研究相变前后物理性质的变化。
AI.result: 发现四方-正交相变（Ts ~373-378 K）对ρ(T)有主导影响：高温四方相表现为标准金属性T-线性电阻，低温正交相出现异常行为；相变伴随结构畴形成和明显滞后现象；霍尔数与能带计算一致；电子辐照显著抑制相变温度；拉曼显示正交相中局部Ba振动模式软化；³¹P NMR谱线分裂表明Ba原子从笼中心偏移。
AI.conclusion: 局部Ba原子振动导致高温四方相中残余电阻贡献增强，这种贡献的衰减是正交相中异常温度依赖电阻率的根源，电子结构在相变前后基本保持不变。

title: Molecular beam epitaxy of wafer-scale O-band InAs/InGaAs quantum dots on GaAs for quantum photonics
summary: We report a scalable molecular beam epitaxy strategy to achieve a low density of O-band electrically tunable InAs/InGaAs quantum dots (QDs) on GaAs(001) substrates. Our approach is based on a gradient deposition of InAs in the sub-ML regime and subsequent capping with an InGaA strain-reducing layer to redshift the emission wavelength. For different growth conditions, we investigate the optical properties of the dots using photoluminescence mapping and correlate with structural properties determined by scanning transmission electron microscopy. Using a surface roughness modulation technique and synchronizing InAs sub-monolayer deposition cycles with substrate rotation, we control the dot density and position low-density regions (< 1 QD per um^2) on the substrate. Hyperspectral imaging is used to map the spatial and spectral characteristics of many individual dots in the low-density region, confirming that our approach is universally applicable to conventional MBE growth on (001) surfaces. Finally, we tune the QD emission wavelength within the O-band using electric fields and demonstrate single-photon emission with g(2)(0) = 0.020(14).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可扩展的分子束外延策略，在GaAs(001)衬底上制备低密度O波段电可调InAs/InGaAs量子点，通过梯度沉积和应变层实现波长红移，并展示了单光子发射特性。
AI.motivation: 在GaAs衬底上实现低密度、电可调的O波段量子点对于量子信息应用至关重要，但传统方法难以同时控制密度、位置和波长。
AI.method: 采用梯度沉积InAs亚单层和InGaAs应变层覆盖的红移策略，结合表面粗糙度调制技术和衬底旋转同步沉积，控制量子点密度和位置。
AI.result: 成功实现了<1 QD/μm²的低密度区域，量子点发射波长可电调谐至O波段，并展示了g(2)(0)=0.020(14)的单光子发射特性。
AI.conclusion: 该策略为在(001)表面常规MBE生长中实现低密度、电可调O波段量子点提供了通用方法，具有量子信息应用的潜力。

title: Three-Band Anderson Lattice Model Reveals Co-Evolution of Topological and Magnetic Phases Driven by Electron Correlation
summary: Understanding the interplay of band topology, strong electron correlation, and magnetic order is the fundamental core bottleneck for realizing robust high-temperature quantum anomalous Hall effect (QAHE). Conventional two-band Anderson models are limited to paramagnetic Kondo topological insulators, failing to capture coupled topological-magnetic phase evolution relevant to the QAHE benchmark MnBi2Te4 family. We develop a minimal three-band Anderson lattice model incorporating Hubbard interaction, s-d exchange coupling, and a BHZ-like topological mechanism. Using the Kotliar-Ruckenstein slave-boson approach, we map correlation-driven phase transitions at filling v=2: increasing U drives a trivial-to-Kondo topological insulator transition, then activates the third band to mediate a paramagnetic topological insulator-to-ferromagnetic metal transition. The accompanying band reconstruction--fully spin-polarized d-orbitals sinking below the Fermi level, leaving itinerant p-orbitals to dominate low-energy physics--qualitatively matches published first-principles results for MnBi2Te4. In the strong-correlation regime, exchange coupling J stabilizes a Chern-Kondo insulator (C=1) and Weyl nodal-line semimetal. Critically, we reveal full d-orbital spin polarization renders the topological gap immune to correlation-induced narrowing, resolving the long-standing strong correlation-large gap incompatibility. Our results show excellent qualitative alignment with recent state-of-the-art QAHE experiments, providing a unified framework for correlated magnetic topological materials and new pathways to high-temperature QAHE.

AI.tldr: 提出三带Anderson晶格模型，结合Hubbard相互作用、s-d交换耦合和BHZ拓扑机制，揭示了强关联下从平庸绝缘体到Kondo拓扑绝缘体再到铁磁金属的相变，解决了强关联与大拓扑能隙的矛盾。
AI.motivation: 理解能带拓扑、强电子关联和磁序的相互作用是实现高温量子反常霍尔效应的核心瓶颈。传统两带Anderson模型局限于顺磁Kondo拓扑绝缘体，无法捕捉MnBi2Te4家族中拓扑-磁相耦合演化。
AI.method: 构建包含Hubbard相互作用、s-d交换耦合和BHZ拓扑机制的最小三带Anderson晶格模型，采用Kotliar-Ruckenstein slave-boson方法研究填充数v=2时的关联驱动相变。
AI.result: 增加U驱动从平庸绝缘体到Kondo拓扑绝缘体的转变，然后激活第三带介导顺磁拓扑绝缘体到铁磁金属的转变。强关联下交换耦合J稳定了Chern数为1的Chern-Kondo绝缘体和Weyl节线半金属。完全d轨道自旋极化使拓扑能隙免受关联诱导的变窄。
AI.conclusion: 该模型与MnBi2Te4的第一性原理计算结果定性一致，解决了强关联与大能隙的不兼容问题，为关联磁性拓扑材料提供了统一框架，开辟了实现高温量子反常霍尔效应的新途径。

title: Angular anisotropy landscape of vortex ensembles in polarized small-angle neutron scattering
summary: We present a symmetry-resolved classification of two-dimensional spin-flip small-angle neutron scattering (SANS) patterns arising from dilute ensembles of spherical nanoparticles hosting magnetic vortex states. Based on a linear vortex ansatz with an axially symmetric distribution of vortex axes and the corresponding analytical expression for the orientationally averaged spin-flip SANS cross section, we show that the angular scattering patterns organize into four distinct symmetry regimes: a four-fold anisotropy corresponding to coherent field-aligned magnetization, vertical and horizontal two-fold anisotropies associated with aligned and isotropically distributed vortex ensembles, and an isotropic ring-like condition separating the two two-fold regimes. The corresponding symmetry boundaries are obtained analytically and define a compact symmetry landscape in the parameter space of vortex amplitude and vortex-axis distribution width. Comparison with a nonlinear vortex profile shows that these symmetry regions are robust with respect to the detailed radial structure of the vortex core. The angular anisotropies are therefore governed primarily by rotational symmetry and by the statistical distribution of vortex axes, providing a compact and model-transparent classification framework of experimental polarized SANS data.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了二维自旋翻转小角中子散射（SANS）模式的对称性分辨分类方法，针对具有磁性涡旋态的球形纳米颗粒稀薄体系。基于线性涡旋模型和解析表达式，识别出四种不同的对称性区域，并建立了涡旋振幅和涡旋轴分布宽度参数空间中的紧凑对称性图谱。
AI.motivation: 研究磁性纳米颗粒中涡旋态的自旋翻转SANS模式，旨在建立系统性的分类框架，以更好地理解和解释实验数据中的角各向异性特征。
AI.method: 采用线性涡旋模型，假设涡旋轴呈轴对称分布，推导出取向平均的自旋翻转SANS截面的解析表达式。通过分析该表达式，识别不同的对称性区域，并与非线性涡旋剖面进行比较验证。
AI.result: 识别出四种对称性区域：1）四重各向异性（对应相干场对齐磁化）；2）垂直二重各向异性（对齐涡旋系综）；3）水平二重各向异性（各向同性分布涡旋系综）；4）各向同性环状条件（分隔两个二重区域）。这些区域的边界可通过解析获得，形成紧凑的对称性图谱。
AI.conclusion: 角各向异性主要受旋转对称性和涡旋轴统计分布控制，与涡旋核心的详细径向结构无关。该分类框架为实验偏振SANS数据提供了紧凑且模型透明的分析方法。

title: NLSTEM: Non-local denoising for enhanced 4D-STEM pattern indexing
summary: 4D-STEM-based orientation and phase mapping has enabled rapid microstructure quantification that can be directly combined with standard TEM- and STEM-based imaging modes. Typically, orientation mapping is coupled with beam precession (i.e. precession electron diffraction) to achieve high indexing rates, adding to the cost and often decreasing the spatial resolution of the approach. This paper introduces a new post processing approach modeled after the non-local pattern averaging and reindexing algorithm developed for the electron backscatter diffraction community, wherein post-collection, patterns are averaged using a distance similarity parameter. Results from Ni and Au thin films show that indexing rates can be significantly improved using this post-processing technique due to improved signal-to-noise ratios in the diffraction patterns. Interestingly, the highest indexing rates are achieved in samples heavily damaged via ion irradiation, suggesting that averaging over curved lattices further improves indexing rates.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于4D-STEM的后处理算法，通过非局部图案平均提高取向映射的索引率，无需光束进动即可改善信噪比
AI.motivation: 传统4D-STEM取向映射通常需要光束进动（预置电子衍射）来获得高索引率，但这增加了成本并降低了空间分辨率。需要一种无需硬件修改的后处理方法
AI.method: 借鉴电子背散射衍射领域的非局部图案平均和重新索引算法，在数据采集后使用距离相似性参数对衍射图案进行平均处理，提高信噪比
AI.result: 在Ni和Au薄膜样品中，该后处理技术显著提高了索引率。有趣的是，在离子辐照严重损伤的样品中获得了最高的索引率，表明对弯曲晶格的平均进一步改善了索引性能
AI.conclusion: 该后处理方法能够在不使用光束进动的情况下显著提高4D-STEM取向映射的索引率，特别是在损伤样品中效果更佳，为快速微结构定量分析提供了更经济高效的解决方案

title: Deep-UV bleaching of charge disorder in encapsulated graphene
summary: Disorder masks much of the rich physics in two-dimensional electronic systems, with charged impurities often the limiting factor. In graphene, progress in reducing disorder has largely stagnated since boron nitride encapsulation was introduced a decade ago. Here we show that a brief deep-UV exposure enhances the electronic quality of encapsulated graphene - typically by two orders of magnitude - by neutralizing charged impurities within boron nitride. Following illumination, standard graphene devices exhibit numerous evendenominator fractional quantum Hall states, including non-Abelian candidates, and frequently reveal hidden superlattice minibands. Even macroscopically inhomogeneous devices, seemingly unusable for transport studies, recover after deep-UV illumination and display Landau quantization in millitesla fields. This finding provides a straightforward route to exceptional-quality graphene, enabling further exploration of interaction-driven, topological and other quantum phenomena.

AI.tldr: 深紫外光照射可显著提升氮化硼封装石墨烯的电子质量，通过中和氮化硼中的带电杂质，使器件质量提高约两个数量级
AI.motivation: 二维电子系统中的无序性掩盖了许多丰富物理现象，带电杂质通常是主要限制因素。石墨烯中减少无序的进展自十年前引入氮化硼封装后基本停滞
AI.method: 采用短暂的深紫外光照射氮化硼封装的石墨烯器件，通过中和氮化硼中的带电杂质来提升电子质量
AI.result: 深紫外照射后，石墨烯器件电子质量通常提高两个数量级，观察到多种分数量子霍尔态（包括非阿贝尔候选态），揭示隐藏的超晶格微带，甚至宏观不均匀的器件也能恢复并在毫特斯拉磁场下显示朗道量子化
AI.conclusion: 深紫外照射提供了一种简单直接的方法获得高质量石墨烯，为进一步探索相互作用驱动、拓扑和其他量子现象铺平道路

title: Quantum coherence governs macroscopic polymorphism in organic semiconductors
summary: The wave-particle duality of massive macromolecules -- such as the fullerene C$_{60}$ -- is a well-established quantum phenomenon. However, whether the quantum behavior of large organic molecules actively dictates the macroscopic structure and function of synthetic materials remains unknown. In organic semiconductors, crystal polymorphism fundamentally determines optoelectronic performance, yet classical thermodynamic models consistently fail to resolve the microscopic origins of phase selection. This includes the long-standing anomaly of divergent polymorph formation under identical thermodynamic parameters across different reactor scales. Here we show that the polymorphism of copper phthalocyanine (CuPc, 576 Da) -- a planar macromolecule comparable in mass to C$_{60}$ -- is governed by quantum coherence during atmospheric-pressure organic vapor phase deposition (OVPD). We establish the Dissipative structure field-Induced Multipartite Entanglement (DIME) framework, which integrates ambient blackbody radiation, molecular de Broglie wavelengths, and frontier orbital directionality to model field-driven quantum entanglement. We demonstrate that exceptionally weak environmental decoherence at room temperature preserves the coherence of molecular matter waves, enabling the self-assembly of ultralong ($>1$ cm) single-crystalline $η$-CuPc nanowires. By leveraging the DIME framework to manipulate environmental decoherence, we rationally designed an OVPD reactor to synthesize a previously undiscovered polymorph, designated $ω$-CuPc. Our findings reveal that multipartite quantum entanglement acts as the decisive regulator of organic crystal assembly, opening a deterministic, quantum-level pathway for engineering organic semiconductor polymorphism.

AI.tldr: 该研究发现铜酞菁(CuPc)的多晶型现象由量子相干性控制，建立了DIME框架解释环境退相干如何影响分子纠缠，从而调控有机半导体晶体组装。
AI.motivation: 传统热力学模型无法解释有机半导体中晶体多晶型的选择机制，特别是相同热力学参数下不同反应器规模中出现的多晶型差异问题。研究者想知道大有机分子的量子行为是否主动决定合成材料的宏观结构和功能。
AI.method: 建立了耗散结构场诱导多体纠缠(DIME)框架，整合环境黑体辐射、分子德布罗意波长和前沿轨道方向性来模拟场驱动量子纠缠。通过调控环境退相干，在常压有机气相沉积(OVPD)中合成晶体。
AI.result: 室温下极弱的环境退相干保护了分子物质波的相干性，实现了超长(>1cm)单晶η-CuPc纳米线的自组装。通过DIME框架调控环境退相干，合成了先前未知的ω-CuPc多晶型。
AI.conclusion: 多体量子纠缠是有机晶体组装的决定性调节因子，为工程化有机半导体多晶型开辟了确定性的量子水平途径，揭示了量子相干性在宏观材料结构形成中的关键作用。

title: Stochastic Theory of Environmental Effects in Nonlinear Electrical Circuits
summary: We present a stochastic approach to calculate the full statistics of classical voltage fluctuations across an arbitrary, nonlinear, dissipative device embedded in a circuit in the presence of a bias. We show how the feedback resulting from the circuit, made of an ohmic resistor and a capacitor, affects the cumulants of the voltage, and in particular resolves Brillouin's paradox to satisfy thermodynamics. We apply our results to the case of a tunnel junction and a diode.

AI.tldr: 提出一种计算非线性耗散器件电压涨落统计特性的随机方法，考虑电路反馈效应，解决Brillouin悖论以满足热力学要求
AI.motivation: 研究非线性耗散器件在偏置电压下的电压涨落统计特性，特别关注电路反馈（由欧姆电阻和电容组成）如何影响电压的累积量，并解决Brillouin悖论以满足热力学一致性
AI.method: 采用随机方法计算任意非线性耗散器件嵌入电路时的电压涨落全统计特性，考虑电路反馈效应（欧姆电阻和电容组成），分析其对电压累积量的影响
AI.result: 展示了电路反馈如何影响电压累积量，特别是解决了Brillouin悖论以确保满足热力学要求，并将结果应用于隧道结和二极管的具体案例
AI.conclusion: 提出的随机方法能够有效计算非线性耗散器件的电压涨落统计特性，电路反馈效应对于满足热力学一致性至关重要，特别是在解决Brillouin悖论方面

title: Fractionalization from Kinetic Frustration in Doped Two-Dimensional SU(4) Quantum Magnets
summary: Separating electrons into emergent fractional quasiparticles is a hallmark of exotic quantum phases of matter with strong interactions. Understanding under which circumstances fractionalized excitations appear is a major conceptual challenge and can help realize long sought-after states, such as quantum spin liquids. Here, we identify a distinct mechanism for fractionalization. Starting from the plaquette-ordered ground state of an SU(4) symmetric t-J model at quarter filling on frustrated triangular lattices, we reveal a compelling interplay between order and fractionalization as a function of doping. For hole doping, we find that the kinetic frustration can be relieved by fractionalizing the holes into fermionic spinons and bosonic holons: the holons minimize their kinetic energy when the spinons form a spinon Fermi surface. We support this mechanism analytically in the large-N limit as well as numerically by simulating the SU(4) case with matrix product states on cylinder geometries and with variational Monte Carlo methods on system sizes up to 40x40. Conversely, electron doping drives the system into a ferromagnetic phase, akin to Nagaoka's theorem. We discuss possible experimental realizations in moiré heterostructures as well as ultracold atoms, and propose dynamical probes to search for key characteristics of the fractionalized quasiparticles.

AI.tldr: 在三角晶格SU(4)对称t-J模型中，通过掺杂发现了一种新的分数化机制：空穴掺杂时，空穴分数化为费米子自旋子和玻色子空穴子，形成自旋子费米面；电子掺杂则导致铁磁相。
AI.motivation: 理解分数化准粒子出现的条件是实现量子自旋液体等奇异量子相的关键。本文旨在探索在SU(4)对称t-J模型中，通过掺杂揭示一种新的分数化机制。
AI.method: 使用大N极限解析分析，以及在柱面几何上使用矩阵乘积态模拟SU(4)情况，并在40x40系统上使用变分蒙特卡洛方法进行数值研究。
AI.result: 空穴掺杂时，空穴分数化为费米子自旋子和玻色子空穴子，空穴子通过自旋子形成费米面来最小化动能；电子掺杂则导致铁磁相，类似于永田定理。
AI.conclusion: 在SU(4)对称t-J模型中，掺杂可以诱导出新的分数化机制，这一发现为在莫尔异质结构和超冷原子系统中实现和探测分数化准粒子提供了理论基础和实验建议。

title: Mean first passage times of velocity jump processes in higher dimensions
summary: First passage phenomena arise across physics, biology, and finance when stochastic processes first reach a threshold, triggering downstream events. Examples include the irreversible exit from a domain, a biochemical reaction, a financial selloff. While typical formulations involve diffusive motion, many stochastic processes are better described as velocity jump processes, characterized by persistent motion interrupted by stochastic velocity changes. Despite their ubiquity, first-passage properties of velocity jump processes remain underdeveloped in higher dimensions, especially under directional bias. We present a general framework to estimate the mean first passage time (MFPT) and higher moments of the survival probability for fixed-speed velocity jump processes where possible reorientations range from strong alignment to full angular anisotropy. For low Knudsen numbers, when the mean free path is small compared to the distance to the target, we derive a universal form for the MFPT in which two bias functions encode broad classes of angular distributions, including von Mises-Fisher, wrapped Cauchy, and elliptical families. In the narrow capture limit of a vanishingly small target, directional persistence induces anomalous scaling, including regimes where the MFPT remains finite whereas standard diffusion would predict divergence. Finally, we obtain a Langevin representation that accurately reproduces first-passage statistics. Analytical predictions are confirmed by numerical simulations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通用框架，用于估计固定速度速度跳跃过程的平均首次通过时间（MFPT）和高阶矩，特别关注定向偏置下的多维情况。
AI.motivation: 首次通过现象在物理、生物和金融领域广泛存在，但传统研究主要关注扩散运动。许多随机过程更适合用速度跳跃过程描述（具有持续性运动），但这类过程在定向偏置下的多维首次通过性质研究不足。
AI.method: 提出了一个通用框架，用于估计固定速度速度跳跃过程的MFPT和生存概率的高阶矩。对于低克努森数情况（平均自由程远小于到目标的距离），推导了MFPT的通用形式，其中两个偏置函数编码了广泛的角分布类别。在窄捕获极限下，分析了定向持续性引起的异常标度行为，并获得了能够准确再现首次通过统计的朗之万表示。
AI.result: 推导出了MFPT的通用解析表达式，发现定向持续性会导致异常标度行为，包括在某些情况下MFPT保持有限而标准扩散预测发散的区域。数值模拟证实了理论预测的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为速度跳跃过程的首次通过性质提供了系统分析方法，揭示了定向持续性对首次通过统计的重要影响，特别是在窄捕获极限下的异常行为，为相关领域的应用提供了理论基础。

title: Altermagnetic-doping interplay as a route to enhanced d-wave pairing in the Hubbard model
summary: Altermagnets - collinear, zero-net-moment magnets with momentum-odd spin splitting protected by crystalline symmetries - offer a tunable route to suppress long-range antiferromagnetism while preserving strong short-range spin fluctuations. We show that this environment robustly stabilizes unconventional superconductivity and naturally produces mixed-symmetry pairing. Through a strong-coupling analysis of a spin-anisotropic Hubbard model, we derive an anisotropic t-J model where exchange interactions cooperatively enhance singlet d-wave pairing and promote triplet p-wave pairing. Our mean-field analysis reveals a pairing evolution driven by altermagnetic anisotropy: for small spin anisotropy, the d-wave channel is enhanced, closely resembling the dominant pairing symmetry in cuprate superconductors, which suggests that weak spin anisotropy may be an essential ingredient in realistic models of these materials. Constrained-path quantum Monte Carlo simulations confirm this picture, showing a regime where dominant d-wave correlations coexist with an emergent p-wave component near optimal doping. As spin anisotropy increases, strong C2 anisotropy and spin splitting activate the triplet channel, leading to a stable d+p mixed-pairing state. This synergistic state exhibits significantly enhanced overall pairing strength, suggesting the possibility of a higher superconducting transition temperature.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了交替磁体中的非常规超导性，发现交替磁体的各向异性可以稳定混合对称性配对（d波+p波），显著增强配对强度，可能提高超导转变温度。
AI.motivation: 交替磁体具有零净磁矩和动量奇偶自旋分裂的特性，能够抑制长程反铁磁性同时保持强短程自旋涨落，这为研究非常规超导性提供了理想环境。
AI.method: 通过强耦合分析自旋各向异性Hubbard模型，推导出各向异性t-J模型；采用平均场分析和约束路径量子蒙特卡洛模拟研究配对演化。
AI.result: 小自旋各向异性时d波配对增强，类似铜氧化物超导体；增大自旋各向异性时激活三重态p波通道，形成稳定的d+p混合配对态，配对强度显著增强。
AI.conclusion: 交替磁体各向异性能够稳定混合对称性配对，协同增强超导配对强度，为设计更高转变温度的超导材料提供了新思路。

title: Force Geometry and Irreversibility in Nonequilibrium Dynamics
comment: 18 pages, 6 figures in main text, 1 figure in Supplemental Material
summary: Recent experiments have revealed heterogeneous dissipation in optically trapped systems, often anticorrelated with local positional fluctuations, exposing a structural gap in the scalar stochastic thermodynamic description. While the conventional scalar framework successfully quantifies dissipation through currents and entropy production rates, it does not reveal the underlying vectorial force geometry that shapes spatial dissipation patterns. Here, we bridge this gap by identifying force geometry as an organizing principle for nonequilibrium thermodynamics and introducing force alignment as a geometric determinant of irreversibility. We show that entropy production depends not only on force magnitudes but also on the relative orientation between deterministic driving forces and entropic gradients, vanishing only under exact anti-alignment with matched magnitudes. We formalize this geometric alignment through a time-dependent force-correlation coefficient, quantifying the relative orientation between the forces. This yields an instantaneous geometric lower bound on entropy production that remains valid even when force magnitudes are matched. For overdamped dynamics, perfect anti-alignment defines a thermodynamic stall where net transport vanishes and the lower bound on entropy production is saturated. This force-level perspective provides a structural explanation for the experimentally observed fluctuation-dissipation anticorrelation and nonuniform dissipation. We construct geometric control charts for both constant dragging and sinusoidal driving protocols, explicitly locating experimental operating points within this force-space representation. Together, these results position force geometry as a unifying structural perspective on irreversibility, spanning active biological systems, microrheology, and naturally extending to underdamped dynamics.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出力几何作为非平衡热力学的组织原则，引入力对齐作为不可逆性的几何决定因素，揭示了熵产生不仅取决于力的大小，还取决于确定性驱动力与熵梯度之间的相对方向。
AI.motivation: 传统标量随机热力学框架虽然能通过电流和熵产生率量化耗散，但无法揭示塑造空间耗散模式的矢量力几何结构。实验观察到耗散异质性与局部位置波动反相关，暴露了标量描述的结构性缺陷。
AI.method: 通过识别力几何作为非平衡热力学的组织原则，引入力对齐概念，形式化地定义时间相关的力相关系数来量化力之间的相对方向，建立熵产生的瞬时几何下界。
AI.result: 熵产生不仅取决于力的大小，还取决于力的相对方向；完美反对齐定义了热力学停滞点，此时净输运消失，熵产生下界达到饱和；该框架为实验观察到的涨落-耗散反相关和非均匀耗散提供了结构解释。
AI.conclusion: 力几何为不可逆性提供了统一的结构视角，适用于活性生物系统、微流变学，并可自然扩展到欠阻尼动力学，为实验操作点在力空间表示中提供了几何控制图。

title: Pressure-enhanced superconductivity and its correlation with suppressed resistance dip in (La,Pr)3Ni2O7 films
summary: The discovery of superconductivity with a transition temperature (Tc) exceeding 40 K in La3Ni2O7 and (La,Pr)3Ni2O7 thin films at ambient pressure provides a viable platform for the experiments that can only be conducted under ambient-pressure conditions, and for the theoretical investigations aimed at understanding the commonalities and peculiarities of the behaviors related to the superconductivity between the film and the compressed bulk systems - including the effects of oxygen vacancies and strain. Consequently, it is crucial to determine whether Tc can be further enhanced and to uncover the underlying physics that controls the Tc value in these ambient-pressure superconducting thin films. Here, we report a systematic study of hydrostatic pressure effects on the superconducting properties of (La,Pr)3Ni2O7 thin films. We find that external pressure universally enhances Tc of the film samples regardless of their initial Tc value. The onset Tc of 68.5 K at 2.0 GPa demonstrates a notable increase from 62 K at 0.3 GPa. Furthermore, we observe that the samples without zero resistance show a resistance dip just above the superconducting transition, whereas the samples that exhibit zero resistance do not display this dip. Applying pressure can suppress the dips and drive the system toward zero resistance. Based on our results, we propose that this feature is associated with oxygen vacancies and that the depth of the dip can serve as an indicator of the concentration of the vacancies. It is plausible that the dip is caused by the localization of mobile electrons at the vacancy sites. Applying pressure can delocalize these electrons, which in turn may contribute to the increase in Tc.

AI.tldr: 在(La,Pr)3Ni2O7薄膜中，静水压可显著提高超导转变温度Tc，最高达68.5K，并抑制与氧空位相关的电阻下降特征。
AI.motivation: La3Ni2O7和(La,Pr)3Ni2O7薄膜在常压下发现Tc超过40K的超导性，为常压实验提供了平台。需要研究Tc能否进一步提高，并理解控制这些常压超导薄膜Tc的物理机制。
AI.method: 对(La,Pr)3Ni2O7薄膜进行系统的静水压效应研究，测量不同压力下的超导性质变化，分析电阻下降特征与氧空位的关系。
AI.result: 外部压力普遍提高薄膜样品的Tc，从0.3GPa的62K增加到2.0GPa的68.5K。压力可抑制电阻下降特征，促使系统实现零电阻。电阻下降特征与氧空位浓度相关，压力可解除电子局域化。
AI.conclusion: 静水压能有效提高(La,Pr)3Ni2O7薄膜的超导转变温度，并抑制氧空位引起的电子局域化效应。电阻下降特征可作为氧空位浓度的指标，压力通过解除电子局域化可能促进Tc的提高。

title: Ultrafast Two-Dimensional Spectroscopy Uncovers Ubiquitous Electron-Paramagnon Coupling in Cuprate Superconductors
summary: The coupling between electronic excitations and collective bosonic modes is fundamental to the emergence of high-temperature superconductivity in cuprates. Despite extensive effort, conventional equilibrium and pump-probe optical spectroscopies still struggle to disentangle couplings to different bosonic modes when their energy scales overlap. Here we overcome this limitation using ultrafast two-dimensional electronic spectroscopy (2DES), which correlates coherent excitation and detection photon energies with femtosecond time resolution. Applied to optimally doped Bi$_2$Sr$_2$Ca$_{0.92}$Y$_{0.08}$Cu$_2$O$_{8+δ}$, 2DES reveals a pronounced off-diagonal resonance arising from the ultrafast generation of non-thermal bosons with energy $\hbarΩ_\mathbf{q}\simeq200$ meV. By comparing the measured spectra with a theoretical framework that explicitly includes the interaction between charge-transfer and magnetic excitations, we identify these bosons as paramagnons with momenta centered near $(π/2,π/2)$ and extending toward $(0,π)$ and $(π,0)$. The resonance persists across a large range of temperatures and doping concentrations, demonstrating that high-energy paramagnons are ubiquitously and strongly coupled to electronic excitations throughout the cuprate phase diagram. Time-domain analysis constrains the build-up of the paramagnon population to $\lesssim 10$ fs, placing a lower bound $λ\gtrsim 0.7$ on the coupling strength. More broadly, our results establish 2DES as a powerful approach for disentangling mode-selective electron-boson interactions and addressing decoherence dynamics, thereby establishing a new avenue for investigating strongly correlated quantum materials. These findings also provide a direct framework for future time-resolved resonant inelastic X-ray scattering experiments aimed at tracking the ultrafast dynamics of magnetic excitations.

AI.tldr: 使用超快二维电子光谱技术揭示铜酸盐中电子与高能顺磁振子的强耦合，为理解高温超导机制提供新视角。
AI.motivation: 传统平衡态和泵浦探测光谱难以区分能量尺度重叠的不同玻色子模式耦合，需要新方法研究铜酸盐高温超导中的电子-玻色子相互作用。
AI.method: 采用超快二维电子光谱技术，结合飞秒时间分辨率，应用于最优掺杂Bi₂Sr₂Ca₀.₉₂Y₀.₀₈Cu₂O₈₊δ样品，并与包含电荷转移和磁激发相互作用的理论框架进行比较。
AI.result: 发现非对角共振峰，源于超快产生的~200 meV非热玻色子，鉴定为高能顺磁振子；耦合强度λ≥0.7，建立时间小于10 fs；该共振在宽温区和掺杂范围内持续存在。
AI.conclusion: 2DES是解耦模式选择性电子-玻色子相互作用的有力工具，证实高能顺磁振子在铜酸盐相图中普遍且强耦合于电子激发，为研究强关联量子材料开辟新途径。
